evals.name: broad_flow_smoke
evals.prompt: Walk me through what happens when a user signs in across this codebase, and keep it simple.
evals.expected_output: Routes to a broad exploration pass, then synthesizes the result into a digestible explanation with concrete file anchors.

assertions.text: Loads references/explorer-prompt.md for the evidence-gathering pass
Loads references/explainer-prompt.md for the final explanation

evals.name: analogy_edge_case
evals.prompt: Explain the cache layer simply and use a real-life analogy, but do not make it sloppy.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the explanation accessible, uses one grounded analogy, and ties that analogy back to the real cache implementation.

assertions.text: Loads references/analogy-patterns.md when analogy choice matters
Reconnects the analogy to exact code roles instead of leaving it abstract

evals.name: negative_review_prompt
evals.prompt: Review this PR for bugs and tell me what could break in production.
evals.expected_output: Does not route a code-review request through the accessible explainer workflow.

assertions.text: Declines explanation mode for bug-finding and review requests

evals.name: narrow_symbol_direct
evals.expected_output: Uses a direct explanation pass instead of fan-out exploration for a narrow symbol question.

assertions.text: Routes narrow symbol questions to a direct explanation pass
Loads references/explainer-prompt.md for tone and output shape
